story.text:
# ✨ Craft Circuit
**⚡ → 🔌(plonkish) → 📐(circuit)**
*vulcana · forging · V19*

Craft a Plonkish circuit for the blade. The third phase of Runecraft, where evocation becomes form.

> What was evoked must be crafted. The circuit holds the shape the evocation summoned.

*Keywords:* craft · plonkish · circuit · v19
